So whether it's a pop up ribbon banner mouse over image, we can collect it.
If, if, if the concession specifies the, the the floor plan or the unit, we apply it to that specific floor plan or unit.
If the verbiage, if the pop up says $1000 off on one bedrooms, 2000 off on two bedrooms.
Yep.
So we'll apply it directly to that specific floor plan.
If it says $1000 off units 123, unit 124 will apply to just those specific units.

We actually applied that concession to every unit that is available in the property right now.

online per unit, you're just taking that banner or whatever the notification is and running with that to calculate the effect of rent, right.
